idea-plugin.name: Rikki Coding Agent
idea-plugin.description:
Rikki is a lightweight AI coding assistant for JetBrains IDEs.
No backend server required - connects directly to LLM APIs.
Cross-IDE support: capabilities degrade gracefully based on IDE features.

Chat Agent
An AI panel that can read files, write and edit code, run terminal commands, and perform Git operations. High-risk commands (file deletion, force-push, etc.) always pause for your explicit Approve / Skip confirmation before executing.

Inline TAB Completion
Ghost-text suggestions appear as you type; press TAB to accept.
  • FIM mode (Fill-In-Middle) for DeepSeek and Ollama - sends prefix + suffix directly to the model's dedicated completions endpoint for accurate in-place suggestions.
  • Chat-format fallback for OpenAI, Gemini, Moonshot, and other providers.
  • Completion can use a different provider, model, and API key than the chat agent - ideal for using a fast/cheap model for completions and a powerful model for chat.
Multi-Provider Support
Built-in presets for DeepSeek, OpenAI (GPT), Anthropic (Claude), Google Gemini, Moonshot / Kimi, Ollama (local, no key required), and fully custom endpoints.
Each provider stores its own API key - switching provider automatically loads the correct key.

Setup
Open Settings -> Tools -> Rikki Coding Agent, choose your provider, enter the API key, and select a model. For local use, choose Ollama - no API key needed.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.1 - Cross-IDE compatibility and capability-gated IDE tools
  • Removed hard Java module dependency so the plugin can install on non-Java JetBrains IDEs
  • IDE-native tools are now capability-gated and gracefully fall back to bash workflows
  • Build/test default path is bash; run/debug/status still use IDE bridge when available
  • Bash tool now supports shell auto-fallback across bash, PowerShell, and cmd
  • Addresses issue #1: remove Java hard dependency for PyCharm/PhpStorm usage

action.description: Manually trigger Rikki inline AI completion at cursor
